kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Dado que o usuário esteja na página de cadastro
Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Quando o usuário tentar cadastrar sem preencher o campo "Nome"
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Então o sistema deve exibir a mensagem "Nome não pode ser vazio"
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//*[@id="modalText"]' contains text 'Nome não pode ser vazio'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

test.name: CT004 – Cadastro sem preencher confirmação de senha

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Dado que o usuário esteja na página de cadastro
Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Quando o usuário tentar cadastrar sem preencher o campo "Confirmação de senha"
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Teste Automação' into text field 'xpath=/html/body/div[1]/div/div[2]/div/div[2]/form/div[3]/input'.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Então o sistema deve exibir a mensagem "Confirmação de senha não pode ser vazio"
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

Maximize Browser Window

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Quando o usuário preencher Nome, Email, Senha e Confirmação de senha corretamente
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Teste Automação' into text field 'xpath=/html/body/div[1]/div/div[2]/div/div[2]/form/div[3]/input'.

kw.name: Então o sistema deve criar a conta com saldo de R$ 1.000,00

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.

test.name: CT01 – Login sem preencher email e senha

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Dado que o usuário esteja na página de login
Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Quando o usuário clicar no botão "Acessar" sem preencher os campos de email e senha
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Então o sistema deve exibir uma mensagem de erro indicando que os campos de email e senha são obrigatórios
Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying element 'xpath=/html/body/div[1]/div/div[2]/div/div[1]/form/div[1]/p' contains exact text 'É campo obrigatório'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying element 'xpath=/html/body/div[1]/div/div[2]/div/div[1]/form/div[2]/div/p' contains exact text 'É campo obrigatório'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

test.name: CT02 – Login sem preencher apenas email

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Dado que o usuário esteja na página de login

kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying element 'xpath=/html/body/div[1]/div/div[2]/div/div[1]/form/div[1]/p' contains exact text 'É campo obrigatório'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

kw.name: Dado que o usuário esteja na página de login

kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

test.name: CT001 – Transferência para conta inválida

kw.name: Dado que o usuário esteja na página de transferência
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Location Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Quando o usuário preencher os campos de transferência com uma conta de destino inválida
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.msg: Typing text 'Teste transferência conta inválida' into text field 'xpath=/html/body/div[1]/div/div[3]/form/div[3]/input'.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Então o sistema deve exibir uma mensagem de erro indicando que a conta de destino é inválida
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//*[@id="modalText"]' contains text 'Conta inválida ou inexistente'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.

test.doc: Tentar realizar uma transferência para uma conta que não existe

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
